case_title: MATTHEW ROSENBERG ET AL VS. GUY JOHNSON

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROSENBERG, MATTHEW ROSENBERG, KAMONWAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, GUY $4,832.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,947.00, LUNA BREEDER FEE $2,000.00; ER/VET CREAMATION $416.00; PAIN & SUFFERING $2,416. TOTAL AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF IS $4,832.00 PLUS COST. PLAINTIFF IS ALSO ORDERED TO REMOVE ALL SOCIAL MEDIA POSTS ABOUT DEFENDANT AND HIS DOGS BY AUGUST 31, 2022. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED MAY-24-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, GUY
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, GUY
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(DEFENDANT)**GRANTED**
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, GUY
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL BY DEFENDANT **DENIED**
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, GUY
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM BY DEFENDANT**GRANTED**

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-28-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS MATTHEW ROSENBERG AND KAMONWAN ROSENBERG PRESENT. DEFENDANT GUY JOHNSON IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT WILL NOT STIPULATE TO ALLOW A JUDGE PRO TEM TO HEAR THE CASE. ***DEFENDANT'S GRANTED ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST IS EXTENDED TO THE JULY HEARING*** DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL DEANGELIS CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-28-2022 - JUDGMENT. PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 7-28-22.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, GUY
DEFENDANT - GUY JOHNSON(APPEARANCE BY ZOOM) - EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER TO CONTINUE: DEFENDANT WILL NOT STIPULATE TO ALLOW A JUDGE PRO TEM.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-28-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-28-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MATTHEW ROSENBERG AND KAMONWAN ROSENBERG ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT GUY JOHNSON IS PRESENT BY ZOOM. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ROSENBERG, MATTHEW ROSENBERG, KAMONWAN AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, GUY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, GUY
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, GUY
